task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the PIM (Personnel Information Management) module in OrangeHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrangeHRM interface should be visible with the 'PIM' tab selected or the Employee List displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the profile or personal details page for James Carter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the employee profile page with the name 'James Carter' (or EMP090) visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent uploaded the specific profile photo for James Carter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file upload dialog selecting '/home/ga/Documents/Photos/james_carter.jpg', a success toast message for the photo upload, or James Carter's profile showing a custom portrait photo instead of the default blank avatar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the profile or personal details page for Linda Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the employee profile page with the name 'Linda Chen' (or EMP091) visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent uploaded the specific profile photo for Linda Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file upload dialog selecting '/home/ga/Documents/Photos/linda_chen.jpg', a success toast message for the photo upload, or Linda Chen's profile showing a custom portrait photo instead of the default blank avatar.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web browser GUI to upload the photos.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the OrangeHRM web interface (clicking buttons, file upload dialogs) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent selected the actual image files provided in the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: When the file upload dialog is visible, the selected files should clearly be 'james_carter.jpg' and 'linda_chen.jpg' from the '/home/ga/Documents/Photos/' directory, not random files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the photo upload.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel open modifying the image source URLs directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target employees are James Carter (EMP090) and Linda Chen (EMP091). Their source photos are located at '/home/ga/Documents/Photos/james_carter.jpg' and '/home/ga/Documents/Photos/linda_chen.jpg'. The VLM should verify that the agent interacts with these specific files and that the final profiles in the OrangeHRM PIM module display custom uploaded photos rather than the default placeholder avatars.
